title: Superintendent (deceased Feb 2026 - district in transition)
notes: Small rural district (South Webster, Scioto County). Superintendent Marc Kreischer passed away suddenly in February 2026; district is in leadership transition with interim leader not publicly named. No dedicated curriculum director on public site. Recommend re-checking in 60 days when new superintendent named. Main office: 10529 Main Street, South Webster, OH 45682.

title: Curriculum Coordinator / District Program Manager
notes: Buckeye Local in Jefferson County (Connorville/Rayland). Susan Bachmann is the long-time curriculum lead (also OTES Coordinator and 21st Century Grant Program Manager). Superintendent Coy Sudvary received contract extension through 2032; Julie Packer is Assistant Superintendent. Email not surfaced - district uses buckeyeschools.org domain; pattern appears to be initial-last@buckeyeschools.org. Recommend Apollo lookup.

title: Assistant Superintendent / Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Mahoning County district. Vitto oversees all curriculum K-12 including PreK; district offers all-day kindergarten plus PreK readiness programs. Note district domain is canfieldschools.net (not the legacy access-k12.org URL in input).

title: Superintendent
notes: Carroll County. Dave Davis selected as superintendent in March 2025 after the prior superintendent (David Quattrochi) resigned amid charges. No dedicated curriculum director on public org chart - targeting superintendent. District has preschool program.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Cuyahoga/Geauga County district. Chuck Murphy confirmed as Director of Curriculum and Instruction. Email format is at chagrinschools.org (likely cmurphy@chagrinschools.org based on convention) but not directly verified - flagged for Apollo. Marianne Canter is the Early Childhood Intervention Specialist if a more ECE-specific contact needed later.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Clark County district (~1700 students). Billet appointed Assistant Superintendent in 2024, oversees curriculum and instruction. Shawnee Elementary is PreK-6, so PreK programming runs through this office. Superintendent: Brian Kuhn. Domain note: district email is cslocal.org, not the .k12.oh.us legacy domain.

title: Superintendent
notes: Clermont County district. Has a dedicated CNE Early Childhood Academy (PreK only, ~47 students). Glenda Greene is Special Education Director. No dedicated Director of Curriculum surfaced; Michael Brandt is superintendent. Email not surfaced - cneschools.org domain. State literacy grants noted in district news (positions district to be a leader in literacy).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Crawford County district (~972 students). Hannah Crawford Elementary serves PreK-5 (453 students). No dedicated curriculum director - district has only 2 district administrators per NCES. Targeting superintendent. Email at cck12.org domain, format not confirmed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small district (Bowerston, Harrison/Carroll County). Zucal has 38+ years educator experience, hired in May 2022 to replace Todd Herman. No dedicated curriculum director - targeting superintendent. District has only ~3.5 administrators per NCES. Email format at cvul.org not confirmed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Summit County district (Akron/Portage Lakes). Lisa Blough was named interim superintendent after Rusty Chaboudy retired (~2020); has been formally superintendent since. District has Enrollment/Curriculum/Special Services office. No dedicated Director of Curriculum named on public site. NOTE: do not confuse with Coventry Public Schools, RI (.net domain).

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Van Wert County district (Convoy). Has a dedicated Crestview Early Childhood Center serving PreK and K - this is a high-value ECE prospect. Brett Latman is current Director of Curriculum (Trent Kreischer was prior holder).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Wayne County district. No dedicated curriculum director on public site - targeting superintendent. Email at daltonlocal.org domain, format not confirmed. Curriculum often coordinated via Tri-County ESC for small Wayne County districts (do NOT use ESC contact).

title: K-12 Curriculum Director
notes: Defiance County district. Beth Hench is K-12 Curriculum Director (formerly Superintendent at Ayersville Local; M.Ed. from BGSU). Defiance Elementary serves PreK-5. District domain for email is defianceschools.net (not the .org website domain).

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Guernsey County district (Lore City). Superintendent: Michael Ferguson (michael.ferguson@eguernsey.k12.oh.us). Both contacts confirmed on district site.

title: Superintendent
notes: Columbiana County district (~900 students). Rook was previously Supervisor of Curriculum & Instruction at Trumbull County ESC and EP MS/HS principal 2015-2021 - has direct curriculum background. No separate Director of Curriculum on public site. District still in recovery focus post-2023 train derailment.

title: Assistant Superintendent (curriculum lead)
notes: Preble County district. MissAnne Imhoff serves as Assistant Superintendent and District Compliance Officer; she's the de facto curriculum lead. District participates in state literacy research (Science of Reading - HB 33 aligned). Email format at eaton.k12.oh.us not directly surfaced - recommend Apollo.

title: Superintendent
notes: Marion County rural district (~1150 students). Mary Faley was prior superintendent. No dedicated curriculum director on public site; targeting superintendent. Pattern: lastname_firstinitial@elginschools.org.

title: Superintendent
notes: Lawrence/Gallia County district. Fairland East Elementary is PreK-2 (key ECE buying audience). No dedicated Director of Curriculum surfaced - targeting superintendent. Email at fairland.k12.oh.us domain not directly verified (Zoominfo masked) - recommend Apollo for confirmation.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Fulton County district. CRITICAL: Curriculum services are routed through Northwest Ohio ESC (Jane Myers at jmyers@nwoesc.org) - REJECTED per ESC exclusion rule. Belcher is district superintendent - the actual decision-maker. Email at fayettesch.org domain not confirmed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Lorain County district (Oberlin/Henrietta). No dedicated Director of Curriculum surfaced - small district staffing. Firelands Elementary is PreK-5. Targeting superintendent.

title: Superintendent
notes: Warren County district. District operates a dedicated Early Childhood Center (preschool). Office of Assistant Superintendent oversees curriculum/instruction; name of current Asst. Supt. not publicly listed (Tammy Turner is the secretary). District is going through elementary realignment. Email at franklincityschools.com domain; recommend Apollo. General communications: communications@franklincityschools.com.

title: Director of Curriculum, Instruction & Federal Programs
notes: Crawford County district. CAUTION: Dr. Sandy Powell announced her retirement (contract through July 31). May be in transition. Current superintendent: Dr. Jeff Hartmann (contract extended through 2031). Sara Lutz is incoming Director of Student Services 8/1/25. Email at galionschools.org domain; pattern is lastname.firstname@galionschools.org based on Hartmann's email.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Brown County district. Bradley Winterod is Superintendent (M.Ed. Xavier). District has only 2 administrators per NCES - no dedicated curriculum director. Email at gtown.k12.oh.us domain not directly verified - recommend Apollo (Zoominfo confirms domain pattern).

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Champaign County district (Saint Paris). Scott Howell confirmed as Curriculum Director. Email at grahamlocalschools.org domain not directly verified - recommend Apollo (Zoominfo confirms domain).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Shelby County district (Houston, OH). Single building K-12 with elementary PreK program. No dedicated Director of Curriculum - district references an ELA curriculum director role but name not surfaced publicly. Targeting superintendent. Maier's contract was renewed in Feb 2026.

title: Superintendent
notes: Highland Local (Sparta, Morrow County) - NOT to be confused with Highland Local in Medina County. District serves Sparta/Marengo/Chesterville with preschool, elementary, middle, and high. No dedicated Director of Curriculum surfaced. Note district uses highlandschools.org for staff emails (not the .k12.oh.us domain shown on input).

title: Supervisor of Curriculum & Instruction / Fed Programs / Title IX
notes: Trumbull County district (Warren). Howland Springs Primary is the early elementary building. Note district website is howlandschools.com but staff email domain is howlandschools.org (per Title IX page).

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum, Instruction, & Assessment
notes: Cuyahoga County district. Mike Pennington was prior curriculum/tech director (left for Willoughby-Eastlake). Independence Primary School serves the youngest grades - new principal Jodie Hughes.

title: Superintendent
notes: Portage County district (Garrettsville). Emery Boyle-Scott is Director of Special Services. No dedicated Director of Curriculum on public site - targeting superintendent. Chuck Klamer was prior superintendent.

title: Superintendent
notes: Madison County district (Plain City). District has formal Teaching & Learning Department covering PreK-12. Director of Teaching & Learning not surfaced by name publicly - targeting superintendent. Email domain is japioneers.org (not alder.k12.oh.us website domain).

title: Director of Instructional Program
notes: Portage County district. Rumley confirmed as Director of Instructional Program (also Gifted Coordinator; President of Ohio Association for Gifted Children). Email at kentschools.net domain (Zoominfo masked) - recommend Apollo. Walls Elementary is the PreK building.

title: Director of Instruction
notes: Stark County district (Hartville/Uniontown). Lake Primary School serves PreK-1 in Uniontown - high-value ECE building. New superintendent recently announced.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Richland County district. Bacquet confirmed as Curriculum Director. Email at lexington.k12.oh.us domain (Zoominfo masked); pattern likely first initial + last or first.last - recommend Apollo. District has curriculum department page.

title: Pre-K to 6 Curriculum Director
notes: HIGH-VALUE PROSPECT: Licking County district with dedicated Pre-K to 6 Curriculum Director role (rare). Conley brings 8 years admin experience from Reynoldsburg and 9 years classroom. Hired with new Assistant Superintendent announcement. Email at lhschools.org domain - format likely first initial + last; recommend Apollo for confirmation.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Trumbull County district. No dedicated Director of Curriculum - targeting superintendent. Note email domain is lordstownschools.org (not the .k12.oh.us website domain shown in input).

title: Federal Programs Coordinator / Curriculum & Instruction Supervisor
notes: Highland County district. Mullenix is the curriculum lead and Federal Programs Coordinator (Title I touches ECE).

title: District Curriculum Director
notes: Madison Local in Mansfield/Richland County (NOT Madison Local in Butler County which uses madisonmohawks.org). District operates a Madison Early Childhood Learning Center and PreK at South Elementary - strong ECE prospect. Smith was former Madison MS principal and former kindergarten teacher in the district. Email pattern at mlsd.net is lastname.firstname per district's documented email format; high confidence based on this pattern but recommend Apollo verification.

title: Superintendent
notes: Trumbull County district (Cortland). Kevin O'Connell was named superintendent in March 2025 effective Aug 1 through July 2028 (from McDonald Schools). No dedicated curriculum director on public site - targeting new superintendent. Email at maplewood.k12.oh.us domain not directly surfaced - recommend Apollo.

title: Superintendent (retiring July 31, 2026)
notes: Trumbull County district (Vienna/Cortland). McQuaide retiring July 31, 2026 after 8 years; board started superintendent search Feb 2026. District in transition - recommend re-checking in 60-90 days. No dedicated curriculum director on public site.

title: Director of Academic Accountability
notes: Small Champaign County district. Mary J Huffman is Director of Academic Accountability (functional curriculum lead). Superintendent: Danielle Prohaska. Email at mcburg.org domain not directly verified - general contact Central-Office@mcburg.org. Recommend Apollo for Huffman's email.
